failure_reason: The Bali land path was still guarded through fixed source strings. This task introduces web/lib/entry-paths.ts as a typed registry with kind, audiences, excluded kinds, surfaces, href, tone, and copy; home and /come-in render the Bali living compound path from that registry. The guard now validates registry shape, page imports, route resolvability, locale keys, and that hospital/care-institution kinds cannot fill land-design/community-living slots. The first focused test found missing fresh-worktree dependencies; npm ci resolved it. Local rendered checks passed with expected dev API connection-refused noise because the API was not running for the visual pass.
